_metadata.description: Segment profiles from hierarchical K-Means clustering

source_mapping.segments_0_to_4: ADS core recluster (subclusters of initial mixed cluster 0)

key_insights: Segment 0: NOT one-timers - short tenure burst then churn (onboarding friction)
Segment 4: CRITICAL - £91K avg, tiered executive win-back needed
Segment 5: TRUE REGULARS - low recency, high tenure, PROTECT (not dormant)
Segment 7: Archive tier - lowest value, near-zero recent activity

metric_notes.recent_12m_revenue: Revenue from orders with invoice_date in trailing 365 days from Oct 2024 snapshot
metric_notes.recency_days: Days since last order from snapshot date (Oct 2024)
metric_notes.estimates_per_year: Annualized rate of quote requests - high with low conversion indicates sales friction

0.name: Early-Churn Burst
0.description: Short tenure (~59 days) but high activity burst. These customers engaged intensively then churned - likely onboarding friction (spec/lead time/quality/MOQ issues).

1.name: Lapsed Regular
1.description: Previously regular customers who stopped ordering. Need diagnosis before discounting - understand WHY they left.

2.name: Quote-Heavy Occasional
2.description: High estimates_per_year but low conversion. This is a SALES PROCESS issue - interested but not converting.
recommended_actions: Remove barriers (MOQ, lead time, spec complexity)

3.name: Project Re-quote
3.description: Higher AOV (£6,826) with infrequent, project-based ordering. Maintain awareness for when projects arise.

4.name: Win-back VIP
4.description: CRITICAL: £91,587 avg revenue. Executive-level tiered win-back with reason-coded churn analysis required.
recommended_actions: Tiered offer ladder: Service fix → Commercial terms → Incentive
Account review meeting with senior leadership

5.name: Active Regulars
5.description: TRUE REGULARS: Low recency, high tenure, high product diversity. PROTECT and grow - NOT dormant.

6.name: Dormant Mid-Tenure
6.description: Had relationship (mid-tenure) but now 84% dormant. Worth moderate re-engagement effort.

7.name: Archive/Low-Touch
7.description: Long-cycle, low-value (£1,393 avg), near-zero recent_12m_revenue. True dormant/archive segment.
